channel.title: Runtime on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Runtime on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Announcing: Agent Harness in Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description:
Microsoft Agent Framework now has general availability for Agent Harness, the production runtime for agents built with the framework. Preview harness users can move the same agent code into production with backward compatibility.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: dotnet: CoreCLR Progress and the Mono Timeline for .NET MAUI
item.description:
.NET MAUI mobile apps now use CoreCLR as the only runtime in .NET 11 Preview 6. The post says the team is at this transition point and asks developers to test the change now.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: .NET 11 Preview 5 is now available!
item.description:
The post announces .NET 11 Preview 5 and says it includes updates across the runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, .NET MAUI, C#, Entity Framework Core, and other areas. The provided excerpt does not include specific feature details.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Serverless agents runtime for Azure Functions
item.description:
Azure Functions adds a public preview for serverless agents runtime, positioning AI agents as a first-class workload. The model is markdown-first and event-driven, allowing agents to be authored in natural language.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: dotnet: .NET 11 Preview 4 is now available!
item.description:
The .NET 11 Preview 4 blog post announces the preview release and notes updates across the runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, .NET MAUI, C#, Entity Framework Core, and related areas. The provided excerpt does not include the specific feature or bug-fix details.

  • Source: .NET
